    Save a new scanned receipt
    addUserAttributes(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.GlobalModelAdvice
    Populates shared user and notification attributes for every view.
    alerts(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
    Renders the Alerts & Notifications page with budget status and bill list.

    Bill - Class in com.finvision.model
    MongoDB document representing a bill or recurring payment in Finvision.

    BillController - Class in com.finvision.controller
    Handles HTTP endpoints for bill creation, editing, payment tracking, deletion, and snoozing on the Alerts & Notifications page.
    BillController() - Constructor for class com.finvision.controller.BillController
     
    BillRepository - Interface in com.finvision.repository
    MongoDB repository for Bill documents.
    BillService - Class in com.finvision.service
    Core service for bill management in Finvision.

    budget(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
    Displays the Budget Set form, pre-filled with the existing budget for the current month if one exists.
    Budget - Class in com.finvision.model
    MongoDB document representing a monthly budget plan in Finvision.
    Budget() - Constructor for class com.finvision.model.Budget
     
    BudgetController - Class in com.finvision.controller
    Handles the budget-save form submission on the Budget Set page.
    BudgetController() - Constructor for class com.finvision.controller.BudgetController
     
    budgetHistory(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
    Renders the Budget History page showing month-by-month budgeted vs.
    BudgetRepository - Interface in com.finvision.repository
    MongoDB repository for Budget documents.
    buildActiveReminderItems(String) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Returns reminder items for bills whose pre-due or overdue reminder days match today's date and that are not currently snoozed.
    buildAlertsBillView(String) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Builds the full view model for the Alerts & Notifications page.
    buildBellItems(String) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Builds the list of bell-notification items for the global navbar badge.

    C

    changePassword(String, String, String, Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.ProfileController
    Changes the authenticated user's password.
    chat(Map<String, String>, Principal) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.ChatController
    Accepts a chat message from the authenticated user and returns a personalised financial assistant response.
    ChatController - Class in com.finvision.controller
    Provides a rule-based AI financial assistant via the POST /chat endpoint.
    ChatController() - Constructor for class com.finvision.controller.ChatController
     
    com.finvision - package com.finvision
     
    com.finvision.config - package com.finvision.config
     
    com.finvision.controller - package com.finvision.controller

    com.finvision.repository - package com.finvision.repository
     
    com.finvision.service - package com.finvision.service
     
    createBill(String, String, double, String, String, String, String, String, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, Principal, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.BillController
    Creates a new bill for the authenticated user.

    D

    dashboard(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
    Renders the main dashboard with both budgeted and actual financial summaries.
    DashboardController - Class in com.finvision.controller
    Serves the main dashboard and all financial-overview pages in Finvision.
    DashboardController() - Constructor for class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
     
    deleteAccount(Principal, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.ProfileController
    Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data.
    deleteBill(String, Principal, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.BillController
    Permanently deletes a bill owned by the authenticated user.
    deleteByUsername(String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.BudgetRepository
    Deletes all budget records belonging to the given user.
    deleteByUsername(String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.ScannedReceiptRepository
    Delete all receipts belonging to a user
    deleteReceipt(String, Principal) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.ReceiptController
    Delete a receipt by ID

    E

    editBill(String, String, String, double, String, String, String, String, String, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, Principal, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.BillController
    Updates an existing bill owned by the authenticated user.

    F

    findBillsForUser(String) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Returns all bills for the given user sorted by due date ascending.
    findByIdAndUsername(String, String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.BillRepository
    Finds a single bill by its ID that also belongs to the specified user.
    findByUsername(String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.UserRepository
    Finds a user by their unique username.
    findByUsernameAndBillNameIgnoreCase(String, String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.BillRepository
    Finds bills for a user whose name matches, case-insensitively.
    findByUsernameAndMonth(String, String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.BudgetRepository
    Finds a budget for a specific user and calendar month (e.g., "April 2026").
    findByUsernameAndYearMonth(String, String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.ScannedReceiptRepository
    Receipts for a specific month, e.g.
    findByUsernameOrderByDateStrDesc(String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.ScannedReceiptRepository
    All receipts for a user, newest first
    findByUsernameOrderByDueDateAsc(String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.BillRepository
    Returns all bills for the given user, sorted by due date ascending.
    findByUsernameOrderByIdDesc(String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.BudgetRepository
    Returns all budgets for a user, newest first.
    findTopByUsernameOrderByIdDesc(String) - Method in interface com.finvision.repository.BudgetRepository
    Returns the most recently created budget for the given user.
    FinvisionApplication - Class in com.finvision
    Entry point for the Finvision personal finance application.
    FinvisionApplication() - Constructor for class com.finvision.FinvisionApplication

    GlobalModelAdvice - Class in com.finvision.controller
    Injects common model attributes into every controller response.
    GlobalModelAdvice() - Constructor for class com.finvision.controller.GlobalModelAdvice
     

    I

    insights(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
    Renders the Insights page with a high-level spending summary.
    isAutoGenerated() - Method in class com.finvision.model.Bill
     
    isPaid() - Method in class com.finvision.model.Bill
     
    isPaid() - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService.BillCard
     
    isRecurring(String) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Returns true when the frequency string represents a recurring schedule (weekly, monthly, or yearly).

    L

    loadUserByUsername(String) - Method in class com.finvision.service.UserService
    Loads a user by username for authentication
    login() - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Displays the login page.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.finvision.FinvisionApplication
    Bootstraps the Spring application context and starts the embedded web server.
    markAsPaid(Bill, Double) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Records a payment against a bill and marks it fully paid when the cumulative paid amount meets or exceeds the bill amount.
    markAsUnpaid(Bill) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Resets a bill's payment status, clearing paid amount and timestamp.
    markPaid(String, String, Principal, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.BillController
    Marks a bill as paid and records the payment amount.
    markUnpaid(String, Principal, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.BillController
    Reverts a bill's payment status back to unpaid.
    MonthGroup(String, List<BillService.BillCard>) - Constructor for class com.finvision.service.BillService.MonthGroup
     

    N

    nextDueDate(LocalDate, String) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Calculates the next due date for a recurring bill.
    normalizeBefore(List<Integer>) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Normalizes a raw list of pre-due reminder days, always including day 0 (the due day itself) and returning values in descending order.
    normalizeOverdue(List<Integer>) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Normalizes a raw list of post-due (overdue) reminder days, excluding non-positive values.

    P

    passwordEncoder() - Method in class com.finvision.config.SecurityConfig
    Registers a BCrypt password encoder used throughout the application.
    predictiveCashFlow(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
    Renders the Predictive Cash Flow page with a 6-month rolling forecast based on the current month's income and actual spending rate.
    processForgotPassword(String, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Processes the username submission for password reset (Step 1).
    processResetPassword(String, String, HttpServletRequest, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Saves the new password for the user identified by the pendingReset session attribute (Step 3).
    profile(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.ProfileController
    Displays the user's profile page.
    ProfileController - Class in com.finvision.controller
    Handles the user profile page: viewing account info, changing the password, uploading a profile photo, and deleting the account.
    ProfileController() - Constructor for class com.finvision.controller.ProfileController
     

    R

    ReceiptController - Class in com.finvision.controller
    Handles the Receipt Scanner page: viewing, adding, and deleting scanned receipts, and computing a Budget vs.
    ReceiptController() - Constructor for class com.finvision.controller.ReceiptController
     
    receiptScan(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.ReceiptController
    Show the Receipt Scanner page
    register() - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Displays the registration page.
    registerUser(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Processes the registration form.
    resetPasswordPage(HttpServletRequest, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Displays the reset-password page.
    root() - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Redirects the root URL to the login page.

    showForgotPasswordPage() - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Displays the "Forgot Password" page (Step 1 of password reset).
    snooze(Bill, int) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Snoozes the bill's reminder by setting snoozedUntil to today plus the requested number of days (minimum 1).
    snoozeBill(String, int, Principal, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.BillController
    Snoozes a bill reminder by the specified number of days.
    spendingVisualization(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
    Renders the Spending Visualization page with a pie chart of actual expenses.
    suggestRecurringMonthly(String, String) - Method in class com.finvision.service.BillService
    Returns true when the user has added at least 2 one-time bills with the same name, indicating they may want to convert it to recurring.

    T

    tracker(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
    Renders the Savings Tracker page with this month's total amount saved (income minus actual expenses, floored at zero).

    U

    updateProfile(Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.ProfileController
    Refreshes the profile page after an update action.
    uploadPhoto(MultipartFile, Principal, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.ProfileController
    Uploads and saves a new profile photo for the authenticated user.
    User - Class in com.finvision.model
    MongoDB document representing a registered Finvision user.
    User() - Constructor for class com.finvision.model.User
     
    User(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.finvision.model.User
     
    UserRepository - Interface in com.finvision.repository
    MongoDB repository for User documents.
    UserService - Class in com.finvision.service
    UserService implements Spring Security's UserDetailsService and loads user credentials from the database.
    UserService() - Constructor for class com.finvision.service.UserService
     

    V

    verifyIdentity(String, String, String, String, HttpServletRequest, Model) - Method in class com.finvision.controller.AuthController
    Verifies the user's identity via PIN or security-question answer (Step 2).
